query: postgresql index types btree gin gist performance

top_10.rationale: Official PostgreSQL documentation on Index Types — the canonical primary source for all index types (B-tree, Hash, GiST, SP-GiST, GIN, BRIN), directly authoritative for the query.
Preprint 'Indexing in PostgreSQL: Performance Evaluation and Use Cases' — comprehensive performance evaluation of all six native index types with empirical measurements.

'PostgreSQL Indexes Best Practices: Choosing the Right Index for Every ...' — comprehensive practical guide covering B-tree, GIN, GiST, BRIN, when-to-use criteria, and production optimization techniques.
'PostgreSQL Indexes Deep Dive: B-Tree, GIN, GiST, and BRIN' — detailed practical guide covering the most common PostgreSQL index types and performance trade-offs.
'Best PostgreSQL Indexes for Performance' — practical guide covering B-tree, GIN, GiST, BRIN, partial, multicolumn, covering, and expression indexes with performance focus.
DBA StackExchange on GIN vs GiST performance — direct performance comparison: 'GIN is faster to search, slower to build/update'. Authoritative community answer with practical guidance.
'GiST vs GIN index for LIKE searches — a comparison' — specific performance benchmark for trigram indexing: 'always use GIN for trigram indexing'. Practical performance comparison.
Semantic Scholar 'Comparative analysis of indexing strategies in PostgreSQL under various load scenarios' — empirical performance study with recommendations by query type and load conditions.
SO 'BTREE vs GIN vs GIST index' — community comparison citing PostgreSQL documentation directly; practical answers on choosing between B-tree, GIN, and GiST.
'A Comparative Experimental Study of Index Performance in MongoDB and PostgreSQL' — empirical performance measurements across PostgreSQL index types and query patterns.
